creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Upstream fixed this issue today in version 0.18.0.
Patch for update port is trivial - just change version in Makefile, run make makesum and update pkg-plist.
But "I don't like" SONAME "libopenjph.so.0.18" instead "libopenjph.so.0" - bump consumers every release. The patch suggested to upstream.
